sqlMap.select: select * from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW(GrossRevenueForTIAKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#GrossRevenueForTIAKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, GrossRevenueForTIAKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, GrossRevenueForTIAKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select GrossRevenueForTIAKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from GrossRevenueForTitleInsuranceLW where GrossRevenueForTIAKey = #GrossRevenueForTIAKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
